title: 秋華賞の後に・疼く両脚

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet loses to Vodka in the Shuka Sho. In
her frustration, she vows to settle the score.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka challenges her to a rematch at the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She accepts and watches Vodka leave, swearing
that next time, she'll beat her rival once and for
all.
